title: cyclophorus petiolosus
intro: Cyclophorus petiolosus, also known as the "Chinese Cyclophorus", is a species of flowering plant in the family Loganiaceae. It is a perennial herb native to China and Southeast Asia, traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant has been found to have antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory issues. Cyclophorus petiolosus is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote digestion and relieve symptoms of colds and flu.
